title: Small 4 inch Knotted Bones x 20 Natural Rawhide Dog Treats LODC
features: HIGHLY RECOMMENDED – At Maltbys Stores, we're a family of dog lovers (which is why we all have dogs ourselves!) so we know it can be tricky finding treats that your dog will love
BURSTING WITH FLAVOUR – Our range of dog treats are specially selected for their delicious aromas and flavours, all of which we know will be favourites with your furry friends
A RANGE OF USES – Use our dog treats as a reward during training, or just to give your pet an occasional tasty snack

QUALITY WE ARE PROUD OF – Maltbys Stores have been a family run business since 1904, and during that time we have always tried to provide our customers with the best quality products for their pets at the fairest prices. So whether you're little loved ones happen to have fur, feathers, or even scales, we're bound to have something for you! Visit our Amazon store to browse our full range of products, or feel free to contact us if you have any questions we can answer.

PLEASE NOTE: This product has been packaged and stored in a facility where it may have come into contact with common allergens, including peanuts, milk, egg, wheat and fish products. This is a supplementary animal food product, intended to be used as part of a balanced diet. Maltbys Stores 1904 Ltd do not sell any products that are intended for human consumption.
description: Product Description A family run business for over 115 years A heritage we are proud of Beginning as a specialist retailer of bird seeds, we have expanded our product range over the years and now offer a comprehensive selection of animal feeds, wild bird foods, dog treats, garden supplies and fishing products. Our Story Maltbys' Stores is a pet and garden supplies retailer based in Hull, UK. Since opening in 1904, we have always aimed to provide our customers with the best quality products we can find. Now in our sixth family generation, we are still continuing to look for new ways to provide fantastic products to you and your pets. We know your animal's needs are very important, which is why we continue to work with our suppliers to find the freshest and best quality products available. Specialists in wild bird foods and feeders Huge range of natural dog treats and chews Fishing pellets, baits, ingredients and liquids Garden supplies, including grass seeds Huge selection of foods for aviary birds, poultry, pigeons, pond fish and more At Maltby's Stores we have worked hard to source a range of natural dog treats. Mostly comprised of natural by-products from the meat, fish and poultry industries, these are not only a healthier option to processed dog treats but are also great if you are looking for a more sustainable alternative. Why it's Important to Choose Natural Treats for Your Dog A Balanced Diet Natural treats are great for providing a balanced diet for your dog. They are generally higher in protein and fibre and lower in fat than processed dog treats. They can also help aid in digestion, as they are free from additives and filler content that can be fattening for dogs. This makes them a great option for dogs on a strict diet, as they will provide the satisfaction of other treats with fewer calories. Wholesome and Nutritional Natural treats are free from added hormones and antibodies, which, when present in other treats, can cause a harmful buildup in your dog that can lead to hyperactivity, weakened immune system and a range of other health conditions. Generally natural treats are also less likely to cause an allergic reaction in your dog as they are free from added allergens, such as gluten. Promoting Health Aside from not containing added chemicals or sweeteners that can be harmful to your dog's teeth, natural treats can actively help to improve your dog's oral health and hygiene. The act of chewing natural treats helps to break down plaque, tartar and dirt that can accumulate in your dog's mouth, and help develop teeth as they grow. Some treats are also great for promoting a healthy skin and coat, particularly fish treats. Improved Wellbeing The act of chewing dog treats is great for keeping your dog engaged, improving their mental wellbeing and reducing stress. They also don't cause irritation like highly processed treats can, maintaining a healthy balance between your dog's digestive system, brain and heart. This increases your dog's energy, develops stronger immunity, lowers the risk of certain diseases, and generally keeps your dog happy and healthy. Rawhide Treats for Dogs Made from the inner layer of cow hide, rawhide chews have long been considered a great and long-lasting treat for dogs who might go through other chews too quickly. The hides are cleaned and cut, then pressed and rolled into various shapes and sizes. Our available rawhide chews are: Cigars Twists Pressed bones (these are available filled with a pizzle or a piece of tripe running through their middle) Knots Shoes Balls Rings As with all natural chew products, particularly harder chews such as bones or hide, there is a minimal risk of choking or blockage with rawhide chews. Always supervise your dog when giving them rawhide treats and never leave them unattended. Ensure fresh water is available. Larger sizes of rawhide chews may not be suitable for smaller dogs. The risks associated with rawhide chews are small but can cause severe damage if left unattended. If you have any concerns always consult your vet before giving treats to your dog.
